name: Contract Retainage Receivable
description: 10% retainage held by VDOT pending project completion

name: Costs in Excess of Billings (CIE)
description: Underbillings - work performed not yet billed

name: Fuel & Materials Inventory
description: On-site fuel aggregate and materials stockpile

name: Field Trailers & Offices
description: Portable site offices and storage trailers

name: Accumulated Depreciation
description: Accumulated depreciation on all fixed assets

name: Accounts Payable
description: Amounts owed to subcontractors and suppliers

name: Billings in Excess of Costs (BIE)
description: Overbillings - billed but not yet earned

name: Accrued Liabilities
description: Accrued wages payroll taxes and benefits

name: Insurance Premium Payable
description: Builders risk and GL premium balance

name: Retained Earnings
description: Accumulated net income from prior years

name: Contract Revenue - VDOT
description: Prime contract earned revenue from VDOT

name: Equipment Rental Income
description: Equipment rented to other contractors on site

name: Labor Burden
description: Payroll taxes benefits and workers comp on field labor

name: Subcontractor Retainage Released
description: Retainage released to subs upon milestones

name: Materials - Aggregate & Stone
description: Crushed stone base aggregate and gravel

name: Materials - Asphalt
description: Hot mix asphalt and surface materials

name: Materials - Guardrail & Safety
description: Guardrail beam sign structures and delineators

name: Materials - Erosion Control
description: Silt fence BMP mats and erosion control materials

name: Project Management Labor
description: PM superintendent and field engineer salaries

name: Project Management Burden
description: Benefits and taxes on PM staff

name: General & Administrative
description: Home office G&A allocated to project

name: Permits & Fees
description: VDOT permits environmental fees and inspections

name: Temporary Facilities
description: Site utilities portable restrooms and fencing

name: Interest Expense
description: Interest on equipment loans and credit lines

name: Bank Charges
description: Bank fees and wire transfer charges
